set.name: MSK
set.longname: Myths, Masks, and Minutes Spent Apart

card.name: ARTHOLD1IGNORE
card.text: Destroy up to two target creatures, enchantments, and/or planeswalkers with total mana value 2 or less.

card.name: ARTHOLD2IGNORE
card.text: Vigilance, haste {T}: ARTHOLD2IGNORE deals 1 damage to any target and you gain 1 life.

card.name: ARTHOLD5IGNORE
card.text: Bisapience—Tap two untapped creatures you control. (Cast either half of this card. Pay bisapience once each turn as a sorcery to transform for that turn.) --- Transforms into

card.name: Abiogenesis
card.text: Liberate target artifact or enchantment. (Exile it if it isn't a Dragon. If it's exiled, its controller creates a colorless 3/2 Dragon creature token with its abilities.) {R/G}, Embrace Abiogenesis from your hand: Draw a card. (Exile it. You may play it on a later turn that a Wizard or Artificer you control dealt damage to an opponent.)

card.name: Absorb Umwelt
card.text: Target creature gains deathtouch and lifelink until end of turn. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card into your graveyard.)

card.name: Access Tunnel
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}: Target creature you control with power 3 or less can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Accommodation
card.text: As Accommodation enters, choose a creature type. When Accommodation enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, create a colorless Equipment artifact token named House with “equipped creature gets +1/+1” and “equip creature with the chosen type {1}.”

card.name: Aetherbeast Scholar
card.text: Prowess Whenever Aetherbeast Scholar deals combat damage to a player, each player may shuffle their hand and graveyard into their library, then draw seven cards.

card.name: Akaaja, Steel Commander
card.text: Akaaja, Steel Commander can't attack or block unless you pay {2}. Whenever you attack, put a +1/+1 counter on another target attacking Hex. Then draw a card if Akaaja has lesser power than that Hex.

card.name: Algaja, Landlord of the Bog
card.text: Trample, haste When Algaja enters, mill ten cards.

card.name: Altar of Euthanasia
card.text: Whenever a Hex you control enters, either put a +1/+1 counter on it or surveil 1. {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Return target creature card in your graveyard with lesser mana value than the sacrificed creature to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Altar of Worldbalance
card.text: {1}, {T}: Exile target card in a graveyard. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice Altar of Worldbalance: You liberate an artifact, creature, or enchantment card exiled by it with mana value 3 or less. Activate only as a sorcery. (If it isn't a Dragon, create a colorless 3/2 Dragon creature token with its abilities.)

card.name: Arbor Battery
card.text: Whenever Arbor Battery attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control with lesser power.

card.name: Argent Court Enraged
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, tap X other untapped artifacts or enchantments you control. If X is 1 or more, surveil 1. If X is 3 or more, draw a card. If X is 6 or more, Argent Court Enraged becomes a 6/5 Artificer Noble creature with trample until end of turn.

card.name: ArkaiIxajaprataKgxrajatajex
card.text: ArkaiIxajaprataKgxrajatajex enters tapped unless it was embraced. When it enters this way, surveil 2. {1}, Embrace ArkaiIxajaprataKgxrajatajex from your hand: Surveil 2. (Exile it. You may play it on a later turn that a Hex you control dealt damage to an opponent.)

card.name: Assert Territory
card.text: Reveal the top eight cards of your library. Put up to two creature cards revealed this way that share a creature type and have mana value 3 or less onto the battlefield, then put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Atir, Heart of the Argent Court
card.text: Atir enters tapped unless it was embraced. When it enters this way, surveil 2. {1}, Embrace Atir from your hand: Surveil 2. (Exile it. You may play it on a later turn that an Advisor you control dealt damage to an opponent.)

card.name: Atraja the Mutable
card.text: {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card. If an Incarnation is discarded this way, create a 1/1 red Incarnation creature token with flying. {1}{B}{R}, Sacrifice three creatures: You may cast target card in your graveyard with a creature type without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Besotted Courtier
card.text: Discard a card: Liberate Besotted Courtier. If it's already a Dragon, it phases out instead. (Exile it if it isn't a Dragon. If it's exiled, its controller creates a colorless 3/2 Dragon creature token with its abilities.)

card.name: Bleak Philosophy
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Then if its mana value is 5 or less, you may liberate it. (Exile it if it isn't a Dragon. If it's exiled, its controller creates a colorless 3/2 Dragon creature token with its abilities.)

card.name: Breathe Gravity
card.text: Transcend {1}{W}{W}{W} (At the beginning of combat, cast your chosen Erysite from outside the game by paying its Transcend cost and exiling a Dragon creature you control.) Return any number of nonland permanent cards with total mana value 6 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Callous Dismissor
card.text: Flying {2}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Draw a card.

card.name: Campaign Strategist

card.name: Channel the Call
card.text: Exile the top card of your library. You may cast that card. If you don't, Channel the Call deals 2 damage to each opponent. Whenever a permanent you control transforms or enters transformed, return Channel the Call from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Death Drive
card.text: Creature tokens you control get +1/+1. Whenever you attack, create a token that's a copy of another target attacking creature tapped and attacking. Sacrifice the token at end of turn.

card.name: Decay
card.text: Deathtouch Rather than sacrifice a permanent with a given quality, you may exile a card with that quality from your graveyard. (For example, if you sacrifice a creature, you can exile a creature from your yard instead.You can't exile cards to pay a self-sacrifice cost.)

Spend this mana only to cast spells from your graveyard or activate abilities from your graveyard.

card.name: Plague Herald
card.text: Other Zombies you control get +1/+1. Whenever Plague Herald or another Zombie enters under your control, target creature you control gains deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Polina Elgaud
card.text: [+1]: Create a white enchantment token named Intangible Virtue. It has “Creature tokens you control get +1/+1 and have vigilance.” [-3]: Create a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying. You gain life equal to the number of tokens you control. [-5]: Exile all other nonland, nontoken permanents.

card.name: Prayers for the Hunted
card.text: {2}{G}{G}, Sacrifice a creature: You gain life equal to the sacrificed creature's power or toughness, whichever is higher. Then draw cards equal to the sacrificed creature's power or toughness, whichever is lower. (If the sacrificed creature's power and toughness are equal, the amount of life you gain and cards you draw is equal.)

card.name: Primordial Slime
card.text: Foreshadow {5}{G}{G} (You may cast this spell for its foreshadow cost. If you do, also trigger its “dies” ability when it enters.) Primordial Slime can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. When Primordial Slime dies, you gain 5 life.

card.name: Pulse Seeker
Puresoul Possessor
card.text: Lifelink {W}, {T}: Target creature gets +1/+1 and gains lifelink until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Pushing Daisies
card.text: Enchant creature When Pushing Daisies enters, mill two cards and you gain 2 life. (To mill two cards, put the top four cards of your library into your graveyard.) Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has “Whenever this creature attacks, return up to one target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.”

card.name: Putrid Corcass
card.text: Putrid Corcass enters tapped. When it enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Pyromantic Duo
card.text: Your opponents can't gain life. If a source you control would deal damage to an opponent, it deals that much damage plus 1 instead. {3}{R}: Transform Pyromantic Duo. Activate only if it's attacking. --- Transforms into Mayhem Tandem

card.name: Mayhem Tandem
card.text: Your opponents can't gain life. If a source you control would deal damage to an opponent, it deals twice that much damage instead. At the beginning of your end step, if Mayhem Tandem didn't attack this turn, transform it. --- Transforms from Pyromantic Duo

card.name: Remove Soul
card.text: Counter target creature spell.

card.name: Resting Tombs
card.text: If a creature would die, exile it instead. When Resting Tombs enters, exile target creature an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. {3}{B}{B}: Exile all creature cards from all graveyards. Transform Resting Tombs. Activate only as a sorcery. --- Transforms into Restless Souls

card.name: Restless Souls
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, put a creature card that's exiled with this enchantment onto the battlefield under your control. That creature becomes a 1/1 Spirit creature in addition to its other types and gains flying and “If this creature would die, put it on the bottom of its owner's library instead.” --- Transforms from Resting Tombs

card.name: Righteous Chaplain
card.text: Other Humans you control get +1/+1. Whenever Righteous Chaplain or another Human you control enters, tap target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Risen Lumberknot
card.text: Reach Risen Lumberknot gets +5/+5 as long as you control eight or more lands. Invocation — Whenever you spend four or more mana to cast a spell or activate an ability during your turn, untap all lands you control. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Rosenhulk
card.text: Trample When Rosenhulk enters, choose one — • Create a 0/1 green Plant creature token with “{T}: Add {G}.” • Destroy target artifact or enchantment. • Rosenhulk fights target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Sacralize
card.text: Exile target artifact, creature, or enchantment. If that permanent's mana value was 3 or greater, its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. (A transformed permanent retains the mana value of its front face.)

card.name: Sanguine Salvation
card.text: Target creature you control gains lifelink until end of turn. When that creature dies this turn, return it to the battlefield under your control with a +1/+1 counter on it. It becomes a Vampire in addition to its other types.

card.name: Scare Away

Exile Utter Pandemonium.
